freshnessTargets: Shift from indoor desk corners to a different indoor or sheltered outdoor spot
Use an action kernel other than 'find_unfold_notice_again'
narrativeNudges: Focus on a small, forward-looking action rather than rediscovery
captionAdvice: End with a gentle forward-looking note instead of soft observation
imageAdvice: Frame a scene with partial presence, focusing on hands or an object in use
summary: Maintain the cozy, reflective mood but pivot from rediscovery to a small, intentional evening action.
